page_metadata.biotools__summary: A toolkit to infer and analyse loss of heterozygosity (LOH) blocks starting from a reference genome (FASTA), mapped reads (BAM) and called variants (VCF).
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: A toolkit to infer and analyse loss of heterozygosity (LOH) blocks starting from a reference genome (FASTA), mapped reads (BAM) and called variants (VCF).
